reviews.comment:
no se queden nunca a hacer noche por que se la pasa pésimo en la ypf y en el pueblito... los alojamientos son de malos para abajo

(Translated by Google)
Never stay overnight because you'll have a terrible time at the YPF gas station and in the town... the accommodations range from bad to awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKai1qQWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I arrived there with temperatures of -15 degrees Celsius and an altitude of over 4000 meters. I felt dizzy when I got off the motorcycle, and the wind was shaking me up, haha.

(Original)
Cheguei lá com com -15 graus e mais de 4000 MT de altitude. Ficava tonto quando descia da moto, e a ventania balançava kk.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKemZ2Zl9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Gasoline isn't always available, so if you're riding a motorcycle, bring a jerrycan.

(Original)
Nem sempre tem gasolina, se estiver de moto leve galão.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKd3FLNDRRRRAB

Excellent

(Original)
Divisa com Argentina  e Chile
Otimo
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKbU5mb0hREAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) And it's the last service station in Argentina heading towards Chile, and it has good service and nice people.

(Original)
E a última estação de serviço da Argentina sentido Chile,e tem bom atendimento povo bom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4cEphOVp3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The trip to Chile was smooth, but on the way back we had to wait two hours to refuel because they were still charging the pumps. This is the right place to refuel, as the next gas station towards Pumamarca is only in Susques, but it might not have fuel there.

(Original)
Na ida para o Chile foi tranquilo, mas na volta tivemos que esperar duas horas para abastecer, pois estavam carregando as bombas.  Local certo para abastecer, pois o próximo posto sentido Pumamarca só em Susques mas pode não ter combustível.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMTZIaTh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Malisima la atencion del playero de la madrugada dia 01-05-23 mala predisposicion atrevido cuando le reclame la mala atencion tirado a canchero la verdad q deja mucho q desear

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendant in the early morning on May 1st, 2023 was terrible. He was rude and arrogant when I complained about the poor service, acting like he was cocky. Honestly, he leaves a lot to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSczdqYlV3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Too cold, no internet, and no fuel. Be prepared.

(Original)

reviews.comment:
Llegamos justo a la hora del cierre.
La PDI muy grosera.
Gendarmería argentina muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived right at closing time.
The PDI (Chilean Investigative Police) were very rude.
The Argentine Gendarmerie was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSbGNPYW5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar nuevo y no te quieren compartir el wifi. Le pedís q lo reinicien al router y dicen q no pueden...muy raro y es tan fundamental para poder avisar q uno está bien y sobre todo en un lugar donde no hay señal de celular ni roaming....ojalá q mejoren pronto eso.

(Translated by Google)
I'm in a new place and they won't share their Wi-Fi. I ask them to restart the router and they say they can't...very strange, and it's so essential to be able to let people know you're okay, especially in a place where there's no cell service or roaming...I hope they improve that soon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURScGMtYnRnRRAB
